name: Indoor/Outdoor Glass Plant Mister With Plastic Pump - Threshold™
description:
Update your garden accessories with this Indoor/Outdoor Glass Plant Mister With Plastic Pump from Threshold™. This indoor/outdoor plant mister features a glass body with leakproof plastic pump to easily apply water to the leaves of your plants. Display it on a windowsill or on a countertop to give your tropical plants, succulents and flowers the humidity they crave.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
